## Files matching `ui/**/*.{ts,tsx,css,scss}`

When implementing or changing UI styling, color logic, icon rendering, or
theme-dependent behavior in `ui/`, apply the `ui-theme-and-vscode-webview` skill.

## Files matching `ui/**/*.{ts,tsx,js,jsx,css,scss,json,md}`

When editing files in `ui/` for feature work, refactoring, bug fixes, or tests,
apply the `ui-core-development` skill.

## Files matching `ui/src/{api,misc,hooks,pages}/**/*.{ts,tsx}`

When editing API integrations, business types, utility helpers, or related UI
logic in `ui/src/`, apply the `ui-api-and-utilities` skill.
